chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 328 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.1512/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.1513/2025 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 09-10-2025 Petitioner, namely Shahid Hussain Danwar holding CNIC No.45203-0818770-7, does not press instant Constitutional Petition and submits that he will file afresh petition after curing some defects. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of as not pressed along with listed applications, however, the petitioner may file a fresh petition, if so desired. Judge Judge ARBROHI
